arts.ttl: Roma vs. Atalanta brings Matchday 14 to an end
arts.sum: Mateo Retegui is the first player in Atalanta`s history to score at least 12 goals across the Dea`s first 13 matches of a Serie A campaign; overall, he is the fifth Italian player to reach this figure at this stage of a top-flight season this century after Ciro Immobile (2019/20 and 2017/18), Luca Toni (2005/06), Christian Vieri (2002/03) and Dario Hubner (2001/02). Roma have won just one of their last 10 home games against Atalanta in Serie A (1-0 in March 2022), recording five draws and four defeats in that period and never repeating the same result twice in a row (most recently a 1-1 draw).
